news.title: IMOVEGLOBAL Arrives in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. Partners in XII International Mediation Competition 2026.
news.description: Imoveglobal Pvt. Ltd. is proud to announce its association with the XII International Mediation Competition 2026, hosted by Dr. Ram Manohar Lohiya National Law University from 20–22 March 2026. /n/n Recognized as one of the leading academic platforms in the field of Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR), the International Mediation Competition brings together distinguished law schools, ADR professionals, scholars, and institutions from across the globe. The event serves as an international forum for the exchange of ideas, collaboration, and the advancement of mediation as a vital mechanism for resolving complex disputes in an increasingly interconnected world. /nNow in its twelfth edition, the competition reflects over a decade of excellence and commitment to promoting mediation, dialogue, and collaborative problem-solving within the global legal community. Participants from renowned universities and institutions worldwide come together to demonstrate practical mediation skills while engaging with leading experts and practitioners in the field. /nImoveglobal (EGPT) is honored to be associated with such a prestigious international initiative. Our participation underscores our commitment to supporting platforms that foster global academic engagement, professional development, and meaningful dialogue among future leaders./nAt Imoveglobal Pvt. Ltd., we believe that exposure to international platforms and collaborative academic environments plays a critical role in shaping globally competent professionals. Being part of the XII International Mediation Competition marks an important milestone in our journey toward strengthening global educational partnerships and expanding opportunities for students and institutions alike./nThrough initiatives such as this, Imoveglobal.org continues to contribute to the development of a more connected, collaborative, and globally engaged academic ecosystem.
